ksa_text: Knowledge of data subject rights under applicable data protection regulations, including rights of access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability, objection, and rights related to automated decision-making and profiling.

dcwf.top_element_label: Interpret and apply applicable laws, statutes, and regulatory documents and integrate into policy.

ddat.top_element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Regulatory Compliance KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.421) to justify inclusion for the AI Innovation Lead. Without stronger framework alignment, this knowledge KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: This Knowledge KSA was excluded as an edge case, yet it has a composite score of 0.421 (moderate signal). Knowledge-dimension KSAs represent conceptual awareness rather than execution; exclusion may be too aggressive.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Overturn: moderate-signal Knowledge KSA in an edge domain still contributes to the role's awareness requirements. Revised to include.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Framework signal is weak (composite 0.421). External validation of this knowledge KSA for the AI Innovation Lead role relies primarily on domain-level alignment rather than specific framework matches.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: GDPR, CCPA, EU AI Act, and SEC data governance regulations confirm regulatory compliance knowledge for governance-focused leadership.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: domain-level relevance of Regulatory Compliance for the AI Innovation Lead is corroborated by DAMA-DMBOK, CDO survey data, and role-specific job market analysis, despite weak cross-framework signal.

decision_rationale: Initially excluded but overturned through adversarial review. Regulatory Compliance knowledge KSA is relevant to the AI Innovation Lead based on external evidence and internal consistency re-evaluation.
